upcoming.title: Robotics Hackathon
upcoming.blurb: Build, break, and ship something that moves. A full-day robotics hackathon for engineers and tinkerers of all levels.

upcoming.title: Data Science Hackathon
upcoming.blurb: A hands-on competition bringing together data scientists to tackle real-world problems. Teams, prizes, and a lot of notebooks.

past.title: Pickleball Tournament
past.recap: Ascent's first community social event. Turns out engineers are surprisingly competitive on the court. Raised $150

past.title: ML Workshop
past.recap: A practical session on machine learning fundamentals — from data prep to model evaluation. Hands-on, no slides-only fluff.
